---
output:
  pagedown::html_paged:
    css:
      - default-page
      - default
      - ../shared/html/guide.css

params:
  table_path: "plantpestguide_content.csv"

  unit: "KLMN"
  image_col: "PNG_small"

  pest_col: "PEST"
  latin_col: "LATIN_FULL"
  description_col: "DESCRIPTION"

---

```{r include=FALSE}
library(dplyr) 
library(stringr) 
library(glue) 


unit <- params$unit 

host_col <- paste0(unit, "_knownhosts") 

pests_raw <- read.csv( params$table_path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE ) 
names(pests_raw) <- trimws(names(pests_raw)) 
names(pests_raw) <- gsub("\ufeff", "", names(pests_raw), fixed = TRUE) 
names(pests_raw) <- gsub(".", " ", names(pests_raw), fixed = TRUE) 


required_cols <- c( params$pest_col, 
                    params$latin_col, 
                    params$description_col, 
                    params$image_col, host_col, "HOSTS_ALL" ) 

missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, names(pests_raw)) 

if (length(missing_cols) > 0) { 
  stop( "Missing required column(s): ", 
        paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", ") ) 
  } 

pests <- pests_raw %>% 
  mutate( .known_hosts = as.character(.data[[host_col]]) ) %>% 
  filter(str_detect(.known_hosts, "[A-Za-z]")) %>% 
  arrange(.data[[params$pest_col]])
```

```{css,echo=F}
.unit-string {
  string-set: guide_title content(text);
  height: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  font-size: 0;
}

@page {

  margin: 0.2in;

  @top-left {
    content: string(guide_title);
    font-size: 12pt;
    font-weight: bold;
  }


  @bottom-center {
    content: "(for more diagnostic tips and photos see the expanded guide)";
    font-size: 8pt;
    font-style: italic;
  }
}


body { 
font-family: Arial, sans-serif; 
font-size: 10pt; } 

.pest-card { 
display: grid; 
grid-template-columns: 40% 60%; 
column-gap: 0.25in; 
min-height: 1.6in; 
margin-bottom: 0.03in; 
break-inside: avoid; 
page-break-inside: avoid; } 

.pest-image { width: 100%; max-height: 1.5in; object-fit: contain; } 

.pest-name { font-size: 11pt; font-weight: bold; } 

.latin { font-style: italic; } .hosts { margin-top: 0.08in; font-size: 8pt; } 

.description { margin-top: 0.10in; font-size: 9pt; line-height: 1.2; } 

.page-break { break-after: page; page-break-after: always; }

```

```{r render, results='asis', echo=FALSE}

for (i in seq_len(nrow(pests))) { 
  row <- pests[i, ] 
  
  pest <- row[[params$pest_col]] 
  latin <- row[[params$latin_col]] 
  description <- row[[params$description_col]] 
  
  known_hosts <- row[[host_col]] 
  all_hosts <- row[["HOSTS_ALL"]] 
  
  png_path <- row[[params$image_col]] 
  
  if (is.na(latin) || trimws(latin) == "") { latin <- "&nbsp;" } 
  
  cat(glue(" 
           <div class='pest-card'> 
           
           <div> 
           <img class='pest-image' src='{png_path}'> 
           </div> 
           
           <div> 
           
           <div class='pest-name'> 
           {pest} 
           <span class='latin'>({latin})</span> 
           </div> 
           
           <div class='hosts'> 
           Hosts: {known_hosts} 
           (may occur on {all_hosts}) 
           </div> 
           
           <div class='description'> 
           {description} 
           </div> 
           
           </div>

           </div>
           
           ")) 
  
  if (i %% 5 == 0 && i < nrow(pests)) { 
    cat("<div class='page-break'></div>") 
  } 
}
```
